$comment: Machine-readable projection of docs/design/MARKETING-DESIGN.md v4 (Terra Mosaic — ADR-0043/0044/0045; BRAND.md carries the brand). The design-lint gate in apps/marketing COMPILES enforcement.bannedPatterns/requiredPatterns from this file — editing a pattern changes what the gate fails. Keep doc and manifest in lockstep.
name: tessera-marketing-design

direction.summary: Terra Mosaic, alive in depth — dual themes (Desert Rose dark / Modern Minimalist light), illustration-first (product truths as animated brand art, never UI chrome), a serif statement over a WebGL shader field, a Canvas-2D constellation band (deep nested knowledge graph, heavy randomized packet traffic, click-to-toggle nodes, pseudo-3D drawn not simulated), theme-true chapter bands (dark stays dark), Instrument Serif voice over Manrope + JetBrains Mono, thermal motion, honest and accessible on both themes.
explicitlyNot: light chapter bands inside the dark theme

theme.mode: dual themes, one token architecture (next-themes, class attribute)
theme.initial: system preference (v4.1, ADR-0045): dark → dusk, light → noon; unresolvable → classless :root = dusk by construction
theme.bands: [data-band='chapter'] re-tokenizes per theme: dark = elevated warm-dark interlude (never a light ground), light = soft slate band
theme.toggle: footer (ThemeToggle, aria-pressed on resolvedTheme); switching ripples out radially from the control via startViewTransition (instant under reduced motion / without the API); dark: variants remain banned — tokens only

tokens.rule: Components reference semantic CSS variables only; every pairing below is pre-verified AA — do not invent new pairs.

chapterDark.$comment: The dark theme's elevated warm-dark interlude (ADR-0045) — replaces the retired light-sand chapter in dark mode.

chapterLight.$comment: The light theme's soft slate chapter (unchanged from v3's .light sand band).

gradients: --gradient-dusk (radial atmosphere <=18% alpha; also the shader field's fallback)
.text-ember (display-only gradient text; counts as the band's gold moment)
sanctionedDecoration.blur: the nav dusk-glass — the ONLY blur device
sanctionedDecoration.heroLegibility: NO veil/overlay (v4.3): the shader sculpts a CALM POCKET under the statement (elliptical intensity floor in the fragment shader — knobs documented in shader-field.tsx); legibility by composition, not occlusion
sanctionedDecoration.graphWash: .graph-wash — translucent gradient ground under the constellation, open at the top (the shader breathes through; no hard band boundary)
sanctionedDecoration.tileHover: .tile-hover — mosaic tiles warm under the pointer (fill-opacity transition only)
sanctionedDecoration.shaderField: components/art/shader-field.tsx — one WebGL fragment shader (domain-warped brand flow + <=12 ember sparks), theme re-resolved from tokens in the render loop, ssr:false, downscaled DPR, paint-every-visible-frame loop (alpha:true so failure degrades to .atmosphere), frozen time under reduced motion
shadows: --shadow-lift — light-ground cards only (light base + light chapter); dark grounds stay flat + hairlines
sanctionedDecoration.texture: .grain — SVG turbulence overlay ~2.8% opacity, dark grounds only
sanctionedDecoration.rule: All defined ONCE in app/globals.css (or the named art component); components consume classes/tokens, never re-declare.

families.serif: Instrument Serif (400 + italic; NEVER bold — emphasis is italic/scale)
families.mono: RETIRED (v4.1, ADR-0045) — no mono face loads; labels are tracked Manrope

display.role: hero h1 only — tuned so the two-line statement holds 375→1440 (ADR-0045)

label.role: eyebrow, wordmarks, annotations (tracked Manrope — the mono voice is retired, v4.1)

rules: italic (often rose) is the only display emphasis

layout.sectionPadding: py-24 md:py-32 (hero pt-28 md:pt-36); >=50% quiet ground per band
layout.bands: full-bleed grounds with hairline seams; page arc dusk → sand → dusk
layout.grid: grid-cols-12 asymmetric rows (5/7); 2/3/4-col simple grids; flex 1-D only

sections: nav (transparent at top; single Start free CTA; full-screen mobile menu with mosaic ground)
hero (serif statement over the shader field; two-line h1; scrim-only veil; no graph)
constellation-band (deep nested canvas knowledge graph over the .graph-wash — no legends, telemetry right-aligned; seamless with the hero: one ground, one shader)
steps (+ pipeline illustration, HTML chip labels)
cta-band (drifting pointer-lit mosaic; Self-host secondary CTA)
components: ConstellationBand(lazy boundary + graph-wash + right-aligned telemetry + sr-only alternative)
lib/theme.tsx (the ONLY next-themes import; system-initial + useThemeTransition)

motion.system: thermal — settle, drift, glow once; stillness is the default state
motion.library: framer-motion via LazyMotion(domAnimation) + m, imported ONLY by lib/motion.tsx; MotionConfig reducedMotion='user'
motion.micro: 150-250ms ease-out (underline draw, button lift 1-2px + one sheen sweep, icon nudge)
motion.reveal: opacity + 16-24px rise, 500-700ms, stagger 60-90ms, once, ~20% in view
motion.livingPanels: budget fills once in view (~800ms); illustration scenes may LOOP gently (v4.1): assembly breathes (assemble-hold-disperse ping-pong), the gate cycles on one shared clock — always eased, never jumping
motion.ambient: <=1 system per viewport: tile drift <=8px over 9-14s alternate loops; marquee ~40s linear with hover/focus pause
motion.signature: the gilded tile arrives once per page load (<=1.2s) then stillness
motion.shaderField: slow domain-warped flow (~0.02 uv/s) + <=12 procedural ember sparks; downscaled DPR; paints every visible frame (skips offscreen/hidden); reduced motion = frozen time
motion.constellation: fixed isometric camera (yaw+pitch, x/z ground plane — NO pointer tilt) rendering every node as a THREE-FACE ROUNDED-CORNER OPAQUE CUBE (top lit, front mid, side shaded, ground shadow visible on BOTH grounds; hub mosaic set into its top face; portrait viewports quarter-turn the plane and stay LARGE — horizontal overflow edge-fades via mask, never clips or scrolls — v4.3); randomized branching per visit incl. agent sessions → tool calls → nested tool calls; weighted packets (heavier = larger, slower, sags its edge — rope physics: the LINKS move, nodes never jump — and carries a hover identity: kind · KB · from → to; the hovered packet HOLDS STILL to be read); arrivals illuminate the object itself (faces warm toward the packet tone, rim brightens, eases down — no halos, no rings); hover subtree highlight + clamped tooltip; click toggles node off (wire cube, traffic reroutes/fizzles); page scroll always wins; keyboard-inert + aria-hidden + sr-only alternative (which discloses the simulated numbers); telemetry = a floating island block (rounded-lg, generous padding) docked bottom-right OVER the canvas (pointer-events-none); the canvas dissolves at EVERY edge via .fade-frame (intersected X+Y masks); cube corners rounded via self-colored round-join strokes on sharp faces (path-rounding opened seams — v4.3); shader renders at native DPR (downscale read as blur); reduced motion = frozen layout, zero packets
motion.mosaicWave: tile-wave — a crest of lift+light sweeping MosaicField diagonally forever (per-tile negative delays); replaces drift as that band's ambient system; pairs with tile-hover (CTA band, mobile menu — v4.2)
motion.liveLedger: GovernanceGate's caption tallies the cycle as it happens (rAF phase on the shared clock); CompilerAssembly's token meter breathes with the tiles (fill-hold-drain on the same period)
motion.themePropagation: theme switch = radial view transition from the toggle (clip-path circle, 550ms house ease); skipped without the API or under reduced motion
motion.reducedMotion: complete, still, final layout — global CSS kill-switch + MotionConfig

voice.case: sentence case; mono labels may be uppercase
voice.honesty: no invented logos/testimonials/ratings/counts/metrics; pricing from @tessera/billing PLANS; integrations as typographic wordmarks; product visuals mirror real surfaces
voice.ctas: verbs; primary -> NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL; docs -> NEXT_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL; no hardcoded domains

budgets.$firstLoadNote: Next 16 + React 19 app-router baseline is ~185KB gz; the budget below caps app code + the motion seam at ~55KB on top. Measured 2026-07-07: 223.7KB. Real UX enforcement (LCP/INP/CLS via Lighthouse) activates with the web-perf gate (F-049).

enforcement.enforcedBy: apps/marketing/tests/design-lint.test.ts (vitest — runs in the standard `test` gate)
enforcement.$patternNotes: Patterns are JS regexes (string-escaped). `files` limits scanned relative paths; `allowIn` exempts exact paths. Adding an allowIn is a reviewed design decision (doc + manifest together).

bannedPatterns.reason: Gradients exist only as the sanctioned tokens in globals.css (§2.3) — never as utilities.
Gradient text exists only as the .text-ember display treatment defined once in globals (§2.3); ad-hoc gradient text is the #1 slop tell.
The two brand gradients are tokens defined once in globals.css (§2.3); the build-time OG/icon renderers reproduce them by value (same exception class as hex — they cannot consume CSS variables).
Tokens only (§1.1) — semantic variables, never raw palette classes.
No arbitrary Tailwind values (§1.1) — the closed token/scale set only; CSS-var parens `util-(--token)` remains available.
Hex lives in globals.css tokens only (§2); OG/icon renderers and the layout themeColor mirror are the exceptions.
Only the tokenized soft/lift shadows exist, and only on sand-band cards (§2.3).
Shadow values are defined once as tokens in globals (§2.3).
One blur device: the nav dusk-glass. The hero veil is a scrim-only gradient (v4.1 — the shader must stay visible); glassmorphism stays banned.
Pseudo-3D is drawn (projection/fog/parallax on Canvas-2D), never simulated — no 3D engine dependencies (§0, ADR-0045).
Ambient motion is the named thermal set (§5), not Tailwind's attention-seeking loops.
Transition specific compositor properties only (§5).
The type scale is a closed set (§2.4) — display/title/heading/lead/body/small/label.
The serif never bolds; sans tops out at medium/semibold (§2.4).
Line-height and tracking ship inside the closed type tokens (§2.4).
One theme, two grounds via [data-band] scoping (§0) — never dark: variants.
framer-motion enters only through the lib/motion.tsx seam (LazyMotion + MotionConfig reducedMotion, ADR-0043) so reduced-motion and bundle discipline hold everywhere.
React Flow is fully retired (ADR-0045 v4.1) — the constellation and effect web are hand-drawn (Canvas-2D / SVG+HTML); the dependency is gone from package.json.
Theme state enters only through lib/theme.tsx (provider + toggle hook re-export) so theming stays one seam (ADR-0044).
No inline color styling (§1.1); OG/icon renderers excepted. Inline style may still set CSS custom properties / transforms (tile positions, delays).
Zero third-party runtime requests; fonts self-hosted via next/font (§1.9).
TLD undecided — URLs come from NEXT_PUBLIC_* env (§6).
Banned vocabulary (§6) — concrete mechanisms, not hype.
Honesty rule (§1.5) — no fabricated social proof.
No emoji (§1.6) — inline SVG or typographic marks only.
No exclamation marks in copy (§1.6).

requiredPatterns.reason: Token drift guard — the dusk canvas is locked (§2.1).
Token drift guard — the primary accent is locked (§2.1).
The sanctioned gradient set must exist as tokens (§2.3).
The theme-true chapter band is implemented as band-scoped custom properties (§2.2, ADR-0045).
The Modern Minimalist light theme must exist as a .light token block (§2.2, ADR-0044).
The scrollbar is part of the brand surface (§2.3, ADR-0044).
The v4.1 faces (Manrope + Instrument Serif) must be the loaded fonts — the mono voice is retired site-wide (§2.4, ADR-0045).
All framer-motion flows through the LazyMotion seam with MotionConfig (§5, ADR-0043).

reviewProtocol.brandSwapTest: cover the logo — tessellation + dusk/rose/gold + serif voice must still say Tessera
